positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    mild_flu != colorectal_cancer).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    mild_flu != cholangiocarcinoma).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    colorectal_cancer != cholangiocarcinoma).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define severe_cancer(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define deadly_disease(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define low_survival_rate(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define bile_duct_cancer(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define cholangiocarcinoma(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
